subject: [RFC PATCH v4 19/27] mm/compaction: NP_OPS_COMPACTION - private node compaction support

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Introduced a new flag NP_OPS_COMPACTION to the node_private_ops structure and modified three direct compaction zone loops to filter out private nodes unless they opt-in for compaction. Added a folio_migrate callback.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces private node compaction support by adding a new flag NP_OPS_COMPACTION to the node_private_ops structure. It also adds a folio_migrate callback and modifies three direct compaction zone loops to filter out private nodes unless they opt-in for compaction.
